top_signals.title: Asian Chip Stocks Climb as Alphabet Spending Revives AI Momentum
top_signals.summary: Asian semiconductor stocks rose as Alphabet Inc.’s plans to spend up to $200 billion this year on artificial intelligence computing power refueled optimism over trickle-down benefits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: China’s Solar Plunge Is ‘Return to Rationalization,’ Lobby Says
top_signals.summary: China’s solar lobby said the industry is on a more sustainable track, after a policy shift drove a 66% decline in installations in the first half of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Rate-Hike Odds Rise as Pricey Crude Stokes Inflation Risk
top_signals.summary: The swap market is pricing in at least a 25-basis-point hike at the October meeting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: UK Inflation at 15-Month Low in Brief Respite for Consumers - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: UK Inflation at 15-Month Low in Brief Respite for Consumers  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Australian Employment Soars in June, Bolstering Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Australian employment surged in June, extending the previous month’s gains, underscoring the ongoing strength in the nation’s labor market and stoking bets on another interest-rate increase.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. signs nuclear power agreement with Saudi Arabia
top_signals.summary: The agreement will provide U.S. companies with access to Saudi Arabia's nuclear energy program, the Department of Energy said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
top_signals.summary: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.
